calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-22-2018 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-13-2018 Continued To Jul-11-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment As To Defendant Clt Computers, Inc.
Off Calendar Apr-02-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance.

RULING: There being no appearance or objection, the Court adopts the tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF PAUL WOZNIAK's Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment As To Defendant CLT Computers, Inc. is GRANTED. No opposition filed and good cause shown as the settlement complies with the Health & Safety Code.

Counsel for Wozniak is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portions of the Court's ruling and submit it together with a proposed judgment.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Reporter: Reyes F. Hunter, CSR#6576, email: rhunter@sftc.org.

Off Calendar Jan-22-2018 Continued To May-02-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
